hypothesis: Pretraining small LLMs on paired MOF textual representations (MOFid and MOF-related PMC text) and compact 3D structural embeddings (e.g., SOAP or CGCNN-derived vectors) will yield a lower MAE on QMOF band-gap prediction than text-only pretraining using the same compute and corpora, with the performance gain being larger when supervised fine-tuning datasets contain fewer than 5,000 samples.
